name: Czechoslovakian Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until soft.
2. Add sugar gradually, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks and vanilla; beat hard.
4. Sift cardamom and allspice with flour.
5. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the butter mixture, mixing thoroughly.
6. Stir in chopped nuts.
7. Spoon half of the dough into a greased 8-inch square cake pan and spread evenly.
8. Top with strawberry jam.
9. Cover with remaining dough.
10. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees for 1 hour or until lightly browned.
11. Cool.
12. Cut into about 1 1/2 inch squares.
